title: References
text:
Levendis, John D. 2025. “The Business Analytics Skills Employers Are Looking For.” Decision Sciences Journal of Innovative Education, ahead of print. https://doi.org/10.1111/dsji.70004.


Radovilsky, Zinovy, Vishwanath Hegde, Ashok Acharya, and Usha Uma. 2018. “Skills Requirements of Business Data Analytics and Data Science Jobs: A Comparative Analysis.” Journal of Supply Chain and Operations Management 16 (1): 82–101. https://www.csupom.com/uploads/1/1/4/8/114895679/v16n1p5.pdf.


Verma, Arun, Kirill M. Yurov, Paula L. Lane, and Yuliya V. Yurova. 2019. “An Investigation of Skill Requirements for Business and Data Analytics Positions: A Content Analysis of Job Advertisements.” Journal of Education for Business 94 (4): 243–50. https://doi.org/10.1080/08832323.2018.1520685.
